rationale: For a Ukrainian resident, the most impactful new development is the Xi-Kim summit deepening the Russia-aligned bloc, and the US-Iran war consuming Western political and military bandwidth — both threaten Ukraine's flow of aid and diplomatic support, though no direct battlefield change is reported.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping visits Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Deepening China-DPRK alignment strengthens the Russia-aligned authoritarian bloc that supplies weapons and political cover to Russia, with direct implications for Ukraine's war effort.

top_events.title: World Bank: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low
top_events.summary: A global economic crisis would reduce Western capacity and political will to fund Ukraine's defense and reconstruction.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US political attention and senior officials focused on Middle East diplomacy, potentially diverting focus from Ukraine support.
